proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x0, x1) = lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(x2, x1) = x0.congr_mod(x2, x1) }(a, n, b)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { abs(x0) != abs(x1) or x0.divides(x1) }(Int.from_nat(Nat.0), Int.from_nat(Nat.0))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { Int.from_nat(x0).divides(x1 - x2) = int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) }(n, Int.from_nat(a), Int.from_nat(b))

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { k0 * n + lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(a)(n) = a }
exists(k0: Nat) { k0 * n + lib(nat.nat_base).nat_mod(b)(n) = b }
Int.from_nat(qa * n) + ri = Int.from_nat(qa * n + r)
Int.from_nat(qb * n) + ri = Int.from_nat(qb * n + r)
ai - bi = qai * ni + ri - (qbi * ni + ri)
qai * ni + ri - (qbi * ni + ri) = qai * ni - qbi * ni
proof: function(x0: Int, x1: Int, x2: Int) { x0 + x1 - (x2 + x1) = x0 - x2 }(qai * ni, ri, qbi * ni)

goal: ai - bi = qai * ni - qbi * ni
qai * ni - qbi * ni = (qai - qbi) * ni
proof: function(x0: Int, x1: Int, x2: Int) { x0 * x1 - x2 * x1 = (x0 - x2) * x1 }(qai, ni, qbi)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(ni, qai - qbi)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int) { exists(k0: Int) { k0 * x0 = x1 } = x0.divides(x1) }(ni, ai - bi)
not exists(k0: Int) { k0 * ni = ai - bi }
function(x0: Int) { ai - bi != x0 * ni }(qai - qbi)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { Int.from_nat(x0).divides(x1 - x2) = int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) }(n, ai, bi)
